business.if_new_what_was_formerly_at_this_locatio: Formerly a small-scale woodworking and cabinetry shop (Riverside Custom Cabinets) with light industrial use, including a spray booth and lumber storage. The space was used for fabrication and finishing of custom cabinets and furniture. Prior operations included normal business hours on weekdays, limited weekend activity, and occasional delivery truck traffic. There was no prior agricultural or horticultural use, but the existing ventilation infrastructure and three-phase power made it attractive for retrofitting into an indoor cultivation facility.
